pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_sumo.sh which copies the data to this path.
Confirmed via run.sumocfg output settings and empirical execution of sumo command.
Matches the explicit instructions in the task description.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset used is the real-world Bologna Pasubio scenario from the DLR-TS sumo-scenarios repository. The scenario directory is `/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio`. Upon running the simulation natively, the output file is generated at `/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/tripinfos.xml`, and the agent is expected to write its analysis report to `/home/ga/SUMO_Output/trip_report.txt`. Empirical execution of the scenario confirms that the ground truth metrics are approximately: total_trips=8776, avg_duration=329.19, avg_waitingTime=154.27, avg_timeLoss=222.64, max_duration_vehicle=3_2700, and max_duration_value=1905.00.
